title: MR.SIGA Dish Brush with Bamboo Handle Built-in Scraper, Scrubbing Brush for Pans, Pots, Kitchen Sink Cleaning, Pack of 2
features: Built with sturdy body construction, non-scratch and odorless bristles, upper handle is made from eco-friendly sustainable bamboo.
Bristles are durable enough to tackle grease and grime yet safe to use on non-stick cookware. Built in scraper on brush head easily removes stuck-on food.
Ergonomic handle fits comfortably in your hand, makes it easy to apply pressure for tough scrubbing. Each dish brush features a rope at the handle end for hanging option which allows for air dry.
Great for cleaning dishes, pans, pots, sink, stoves, kitchen utensils, it's also ideal for cleaning your countertop, bathtub. Comes with pack of 2.

MR.SIGA's mission: Make your housework easier, and make the world cleaner. Should you have any questions about the product or after-sale service, please do not hesitate to contact us. We are here for support and advice!
description: Product Description MR.SIGA Dish Brush with Bamboo Handle Built-in Scraper Scrubbing Brush for Pans, Pots, Kitchen Sink Cleaning, Pack of 2 Built-in Scraper Built in scraper on brush head easily removes stuck-on food Bamboo Handle Handle is made from sustainable bamboo, not easy to break in winter Durable Bristles Bristles are durable enough to tackle grease and grime yet safe to use on non-stick cookware. Built-in Scraper Built in scraper on brush head easily removes stuck-on food and stains. Ergonomic Handle Fits comfortably in your hand, makes it easy to apply pressure for tough scrubbing. Lanyard Design Each dish brush features a rope at the handle end for hanging option which allows for air dry.
